examples: The two converse, and Elspeth once again loses herself in her past.
Elspeth follows Koth with his erstwhile guest, finally seeing the lands Koth calls home.
Elspeth killed one with a throwing knife and the other she decapitated while it attacked Venser.
Elspeth Insch, the headmistress, is a leading light in the campaign to save the grammar schools.
Elspeth Harte, from Bothwell in South Lanarkshire, was one of the trial participants.
